trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Diet
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "What type of milk do you mainly use?" If the participant activated the Help button they were shown the message:     If you use more than one type of milk, please select the one that you drink the most. If you are unsure, select Do not know.
